kicker: An open knowledge pool for the trades
intro: Craft Codex brings the master's knowledge to where the work happens: as a parametric 3D workpiece, as a voice that answers trade questions, and as a hologram in the room. Built offline-proof — for real workshops, not fair-weather Wi-Fi.

pieces.title: Understanding pins & tails
pieces.body: From the very beginning: what is a pin, what is it good for, which types are there? Understand first — then lay out. With a learning path and the master's voice.

pieces.title: Dovetail
pieces.body: The crowning discipline of corner joints — parametric in 3D. Drag pins, angles and board dimensions live, through all five learning steps from layout to the final check.

pieces.title: The master's voice
pieces.body: Ask questions as if the master were at the next bench: answers from the trade corpus with sources from official codes — spoken, even fully offline.

pieces.title: Hologram (WebXR)
pieces.body: The same workpiece, immersive: put on a Quest 3 or Galaxy XR and the board floats at bench height in your room — switch learning steps with a hand gesture.

vision.title: Not a product. A <hl>universe</hl> of craft knowledge.
vision.body: Students, teachers and masters build it together — Cody turns their words into living tools. Generation after generation.
